transitions.name: Start Deployment
transitions.description: Initiate the deployment of the Cyoda environment.

process.name: DeployCyodaEnv
process.description: Process to deploy the Cyoda environment.

transitions.name: Complete Deployment
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment process is in progress.

process.name: FinalizeCyodaEnvDeployment
process.description: Process to complete the deployment of Cyoda environment.

transitions.name: Start User App Deployment
transitions.description: Begin the deployment of user application.
transitions.start_state_description: The user application deployment request is pending.
transitions.end_state_description: The user application deployment is currently underway.

process.name: DeployUserApp
process.description: Process to deploy the user application.

transitions.name: Complete User App Deployment
transitions.description: Finalization of the user application deployment process.
transitions.start_state_description: User application deployment process is in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: User application has been deployed successfully.

process.name: FinalizeUserAppDeployment
process.description: Process to complete the deployment of user application.
